calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-01-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 11:25am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Appellant Ghilotti Brothers, Inc., did not appear in court, but filed a letter dated 1/30/06, that the matter had settled. Jonathan Fustini, respondent, appeared late in Pro Per.
Judge Myles explained to him the matter was being dismissed based on appellant's correspondence. Mr. Fustini, said he understood and did not object to the dismissal.
11:35am
Court adjourns.
